shippingPolicyAchievePackGloba: Shipping Policy | Achieve Pack - Global Packaging Delivery
achievePackShipsToOver100Count: Achieve Pack ships to over 100 countries worldwide. Our main markets include:
donTSeeYourCountryContactUsFor: Don't see your country? Contact us for a shipping quote.
timesShownAreFromShipmentDateA: * Times shown are from shipment date, after production is complete. Production typically takes 2-3 weeks.
shippingCostsAreCalculatedBase: Shipping costs are calculated based on order weight, volume, destination, and shipping method. We provide shipping quotes with your order quotation.
allShipmentsAreSentDdpDelivere: All shipments are sent DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) where possible, meaning we cover import duties and taxes. For some destinations, you may be responsible for local import charges. We'll inform you before shipment.
wePartnerWithReliableInternati: We partner with reliable international carriers to ensure safe and timely delivery:
allShipmentsIncludeTrackingYou: All shipments include tracking. You will receive:
shipmentConfirmationEmailWithT: Shipment confirmation email with tracking number
ifYouHavenTReceivedTrackingInf: If you haven't received tracking information within 24 hours of shipment notification, please contact us.
whileWeStriveForOnTimeDelivery: While we strive for on-time delivery, delays may occur due to customs clearance, weather, or carrier issues. We monitor shipments and will proactively notify you of any significant delays.
allShipmentsAreFullyInsuredIfY: All shipments are fully insured. If your package arrives damaged or is lost in transit, contact us within 7 days of expected delivery. We will file a claim and arrange replacement or refund.
pleaseEnsureYourShippingAddres: Please ensure your shipping address is correct when ordering. Re-delivery fees or return shipping costs for incorrect addresses are the customer's responsibility.
questionsAboutShippingWeReHere: Questions about shipping? We're here to help:
